facts.claim: Rio de Janeiro, also known simply as Rio, is the capital of the state of Rio de Janeiro.
It is the second-most-populous city in Brazil after São Paulo and the sixth-most-populous city in the Americas.

Rio de Janeiro,[a] also known simply as Rio,[8] is the capital of the state of Rio de Janeiro. It is the second-most-populous city in Brazil after São Paulo and the sixth-most-populous city in the Americas.
